goals: Apply small UX or maintainability polish in non-protected UI surfaces.
Keep the change narrowly scoped and avoid domain logic rewrites.
Leave clear notes about anything that was intentionally deferred.
must_run: If routing or guard logic changed, run: cd frontend && npm run test:run -- src/test/parity/rbacRouteParity.test.js
required_artifacts: note of any deferred polish items
stop_conditions: A protected path must be edited.
The task exceeds the file or diff budget.
The requested polish requires backend or domain-logic changes.
review_notes: Keep this task cosmetic or narrowly maintainability-oriented.
Create a follow-up contract instead of expanding scope.
